top_signals.title: Universal theme park to be UK’s most popular tourist attraction
top_signals.summary: The Universal United Kingdom Resort, one of the largest ever investments in the UK tourism sector, will employ thousands and entertain millions of people.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Joint Chiefs head makes first official visit to post-Maduro Venezuela
top_signals.summary: The visit comes five months after the high-risk U.S. military operation to remove Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: South Korea’s AI impact sparks pressure across government bond market
top_signals.summary: The nation's government bonds have lost 7.5% this year in local-currency terms, the worst performance among 44 markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: EU unveils tech sovereignty package to cut reliance on US, Chinese suppliers
top_signals.summary: The package bundles two draft laws — a Chips Act 2.0 and a Cloud and AI Development Act (CADA) — alongside an Open Source Strategy and a roadmap for digitalizing the energy system.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: FTC considers setting aside or modifying $150 million privacy penalty against X
top_signals.summary: Twitter, renamed X in 2023, filed a petition saying that the settlement terms are unfair because the order was issued against a company that “no longer exists,” the workers responsible for the scheme no longer work for X and the firm has since established a “world class” privacy and data protection program.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
